purpose: Public HTTPS URLs for OpenAI / ChatGPT image prompts and URL-in-prompt grounding.

assets.name: Gallery — origami lucky star lockup 3D
assets.prompt: Edit image one based on the prompt. Preserve exact Japanese origami lucky star geometry from reference — puffy five-point paper fold (折り紙 wishing star), soft crease facets, navy #0F2044 body and gold #F59E0B seam accents, radial paper gradient. NOT military medal, NOT laurel wreath, NOT sharp trophy star, NOT judicial seal. Premium 3D gallery hero: EarnedStar horizontal lockup — origami lucky star mark left, wordmark right, soft studio rim light on navy editorial background, photoreal SaaS marketing still.

assets.name: Gallery — motto plaque 3D
assets.prompt: 3D engraved motto plaque on dark navy stone: No order, no star. Every review is real. Gold serif lettering, subtle gold dust, premium editorial product shot, centered composition.

assets.name: Brand system board — origami star family
assets.prompt: EarnedStar brand board on cream editorial desk: origami lucky star marks in navy and gold, wordmark lockups, color chips #0F2044 and #F59E0B, verified green chip small, top-down product photography, no readable fake URLs.

assets.name: Q1 Leader award badge chrome
assets.prompt: Circular award medal badge Q1 Leader — EarnedStar origami star center, machined gold rim, navy enamel, subtle specular sheen, floating on dark gradient, premium SaaS trust badge not sports trophy.

assets.name: Verified Human trust badge
assets.prompt: Verified Human badge — shield with origami star and subtle human silhouette check, emerald verified ring accent only on chip, navy and gold EarnedStar palette, 3D chrome sticker on dark background.

assets.name: Progressive rating badge chrome
assets.prompt: EarnedStar rating badge showing five progressive gold stars 4.8 score, origami star medallion left, machined metal card on navy, subtle glass edge, SaaS review widget chrome not Amazon stars.

assets.name: OG social image 1200x630
assets.prompt: EarnedStar OG card 16:9 — navy editorial background, large origami lucky star left, headline area right: Only verified buyers earn your stars, gold accent line, clean SaaS marketing not automotive.

assets.name: Pricing page hero
assets.prompt: EarnedStar pricing hero — split layout SaaS dashboard with verified review metrics and flat pricing cards, navy UI chrome gold CTAs, warm stone page bg bleed, photoreal UI mock not cartoon.

assets.name: Dashboard empty state illustration
assets.prompt: Friendly empty state for merchant dashboard — origami star on pedestal waiting for first verified review, soft cream background, minimal line art plus subtle 3D star, encouraging not childish.
